Solana memecoin terminal for live pairs and Telegram flow

SlimeWire combines live pairs, fresh launches, token scans, Dex chart handoff, Telegram bot workflows, wallet state, positions, PnL, and launch tools in one terminal path.

Open terminalSolana trading terminal

What this workflow covers

Live pairs

Watch fresh Solana memecoin activity from a terminal view.

Token scans

Inspect contract addresses with market and risk context.

Dex charts

Move into chart and transaction review quickly.

Telegram bot

Connect group alerts, calls, scans, and proof links.

Wallet state

Review balances, positions, and realized PnL.

Launch tools

Give creators and communities cleaner launch handoff.

FAQ

What is a Solana memecoin terminal?

A Solana memecoin terminal is a web workflow for live pairs, token scans, charts, wallet state, positions, alerts, and trade review.

How is a terminal different from a Telegram bot?

A terminal gives deeper chart and wallet context, while Telegram is useful for scans, alerts, group calls, and quick handoff.

Does SlimeWire support launch workflows?

Yes. SlimeWire includes launch, raid, proof, scan, and Telegram handoff pages around Solana memecoin launches.
